arts.ttl: Lewandowski proving that age is just a number at Barca
arts.sum: Lewandowski’s 25 league goals put him three above second-placed Kylian Mbappé in the Golden Boot race in Spain, and with just eight matches left, he is on pace to surpass Lionel Messi as the player with the most top scorer awards in Europe’s top five list by claiming his ninth title. In his first season under Flick, Lewandowski became the second player in football history after Johan Cruyff to win a European treble whilst finishing as top scorer in all three major club competitions.
